tasks.subject: Task 1: backlinkIndex core API (extract + updateNote + getSourcesFor + clear)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the pure in-memory index module — extraction, two-way map updates, lookup, clear — with full unit-test coverage. No IDB integration yet.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/core/backlinkIndex.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndex.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- backlinkIndex.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/core/backlinkIndex.ts","app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndex.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- backlinkIndex.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["extractLinkTargets parses internal+broken marks with xml-unescape","updateNote diffs forward map and updates both maps","deleted=true purges all entries for the guid","getSourcesFor returns ReadonlySet or undefined","clear empties both maps","symmetric invariant holds after every op"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Init lifecycle (installBacklinkIndex + ensureBacklinkIndexReady + layout wire-in)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose `installBacklinkIndex()` async-rebuild + `ensureBacklinkIndexReady()` awaitable, and wire into +layout.svelte next to installRealNoteSync.

**Files:** `app/src/lib/core/backlinkIndex.ts`, `app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndex.test.ts`, `app/src/routes/+layout.svelte:177`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- backlinkIndex.test.ts && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/core/backlinkIndex.ts","app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndex.test.ts","app/src/routes/+layout.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- backlinkIndex.test.ts && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["installBacklinkIndex schedules async rebuild from IDB","ensureBacklinkIndexReady awaits or resolves immediately","repeat install replaces in-flight promise","layout.svelte wires install before installRealNoteSync"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire backlinkIndex.updateNote into noteStore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Funnel every IDB write through backlinkIndex.updateNote — putNote, putNoteSynced, deleteNote.

**Files:** `app/src/lib/storage/noteStore.ts:36-44, 51-54, 63-74`, `app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndexStoreIntegration.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/storage/noteStore.ts","app/tests/unit/core/backlinkIndexStoreIntegration.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["putNote populates index","putNoteSynced updates index","deleteNote purges entries for guid","no caller-side changes required"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite rewriteBacklinksForRename using index + Promise.all
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace O(N × L) full-corpus scan with O(M) indexed sweep + Promise.all parallel writes.

**Files:** `app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts:172-198`, `app/tests/unit/core/rewriteBacklinksForRename.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/core/noteManager.ts","app/tests/unit/core/rewriteBacklinksForRename.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["sweep uses index for source lookup","Promise.all parallel writes","soft-deleted skipped","oldTitle===newTitle short-circuit","empty sources short-circuit","post-sweep index migrated to newTitle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: flushSave serialization (both editor routes)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Chain consecutive flushSave calls via promise chain so a second cannot start until first (+ sweep) resolves.

**Files:** `app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte:349-367`, `app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte:381-394`

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test` + manual UI smoke

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte","app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check && npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["flushSave body wrapped in flushChain.then","second call awaits first","errors logged but chain survives","Promise<void> return preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admin tools — 백링크 인덱스 재구성 button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Manual rebuild action on /admin/tools. Clears index + re-scans all notes. No content modification.

**Files:** `app/src/routes/admin/tools/+page.svelte`

**Verify:** Manual smoke + `cd app && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/routes/admin/tools/+page.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check","acceptanceCriteria":["button labeled '백링크 인덱스 재구성' on /admin/tools","click clears index and re-scans all notes","button disabled during rebuild","toast shows note count","no note content modified"]}
```
